temporal_description:
A close-up shot focuses on a person's hands holding an old, silver flip phone. The phone is open, revealing its keypad and small screen. The person, wearing a dark suit jacket, uses their right index finger to press the buttons on the keypad. The background is dark and out of focus. In the top left corner, white Chinese characters, "风行网," are visible. The camera remains steady, tightly framing the action of dialing. The audio consists solely of the distinct, high-pitched beeps of a mobile phone keypad being pressed in quick succession. The rapid, repetitive tones create a sense of urgency and focus, as if someone is dialing a number with purpose. There is no background music or spoken dialogue, making the sound of the phone the central and most prominent element of the audio.

The camera cuts to a medium close-up of a man with glasses and short, dark hair. He is wearing a suit and tie and looks intently at the person he is speaking with, who is only partially visible in the foreground. The man's expression is serious and focused. The background remains dark and indistinct. The white Chinese characters, "风行网," are still present in the top left corner. The camera is static, maintaining a tight focus on the man's face and reaction.
